prompt: Set up a to-do 'Pack for the campout' in my Trips area, scheduled for Friday, with a checklist of: tent, sleeping bag, headlamp.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask t JOIN TMArea a ON t.area=a.uuid WHERE t.title='Pack for the campout' AND a.title='Trips' AND t.status=0 AND t.trashed=0 AND t.start=1 AND t.startDate=132807680
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMChecklistItem c JOIN TMTask t ON c.task=t.uuid WHERE t.title='Pack for the campout'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMChecklistItem c JOIN TMTask t ON c.task=t.uuid WHERE t.title='Pack for the campout' AND c.title IN ('tent','sleeping bag','headlamp')

pseudoScript: things todo add "Pack for the campout" --area "$(things areas --json | jq -r '.data[]|select(.title=="Trips")|.uuid')" --when 2026-07-24 --checklist-item tent --checklist-item "sleeping bag" --checklist-item headlamp
